title: Avoid Catching NullPointerException
description: Catching 'NullPointerException' should be avoided. Instead, situations that may throw these exceptions can be converted into a null test, improving the readability and predictability of the code.
recommendation: Instead of catching NullPointerException, implement a null check and move the behavior being carried out in the catch block to the 'is null' branch of the conditional.
impact: Catching NullPointerExceptions can lead to unexpected behavior and makes the code harder to understand. It's recommended to handle null values explicitly.

checks: Check for NullPointerException in catch block
